disclaimer_ar: Linux Doctor provides diagnostic guidance and commands to run manually. It never executes commands on your system.

flows.title_ar: A Service Is Failed or Not Running
flows.summary_ar: Diagnose systemd status, logs, configuration, dependencies, ports, and permissions.
keywords_ar: A Service Is Failed or Not Running
Diagnose systemd status, logs, configuration, dependencies, ports, and permissions.

service-status.text_ar: Run this check and choose the result that best matches the output.
service-status.explanation_ar: Shows the current unit state and recent messages.
service-status.expected_result_ar: Review the output and select the matching result.

choices.label_ar: The service is active, but the problem remains
The service is inactive or stopped

service-start.explanation_ar: Runs the displayed command as part of this procedure.
service-start.expected_result_ar: Review the output and select the matching result.

service-logs.expected_result_ar: Review the output and select the matching result.

choices.label_ar: The output points to a configuration or syntax error
The output points to a port conflict
The output points to a failed dependency
The message is unclear or no useful error is shown
